fallback_lookup.when: No configured preferred model is available or all configured models fail.
fallback_lookup.action: Run local opencode model discovery first. If local discovery is insufficient and internet access is available, quickly look up current OpenCode/provider model names, then update this file before delegating.

notes: Codex remains the main agent and must review all OpenCode output before applying or reporting it.
Prefer free or cheap models for read-only subtasks. Use billing-required opencode-go models only when available and justified.
